articles.title: Apple introduces Siri AI, a profoundly more capable and personal assistant - Apple
articles.description: Apple introduces Siri AI, a profoundly more capable and personal assistant powered by Apple Intelligence, with personal context, world knowledge, and onscreen awareness.

articles.title: Apple’s iOS 27 Is Filled With Hints About Its Upcoming Foldable iPhone - Bloomberg.com
articles.description: Apple Inc.’s iOS 27 and related software updates offer the clearest public signs yet of the company’s upcoming foldable iPhone, revealing references to folding hardware and new features designed for larger, more flexible displays.

articles.title: 5 things I already love from the iOS 27 beta - The Verge
articles.description: I’ve already been testing the first iOS 27 developer beta, and there are some features that I’m a big fan of, like Liquid Glass improvements and a new extra large option for widgets.

articles.title: Xbox Employee Responds To New Trailer Showing PS5 Logo For Gears Of War E-Day - Pure Xbox
articles.description: "I can confirm this is not true"

articles.title: iOS 27 revamps AirPods settings in a big way, here’s the new design - 9to5Mac
articles.description: iOS 27 was introduced today at WWDC, and the first developer beta reveals an overhaul to AirPods settings inside the Settings app.

articles.title: tvOS 27 Drops Support for Two Apple TV Models - MacRumors
articles.description: The upcoming tvOS 27 update that was previewed today drops support for two Apple TV models.   The two Apple TV models that are compatible with tvOS...

articles.title: Apple announces watchOS 27, now with Siri AI - The Verge
articles.description: watchOS 27 introduces support for Siri AI, a redesigned “dynamic” app grid, and improvements to health and fitness tracking.

articles.title: Gemini 3.5 and Antigravity come to Google NotebookLM - Ars Technica
articles.description: NotebookLM is getting a big upgrade, but it's only for AI Ultra and enterprise accounts right now.

articles.title: macOS 27 'Golden Gate' delivers more Liquid Glass and updated Siri - AppleInsider
Apple puts parents back in control of kids’ iPhone use - TechCrunch
articles.description: Apple is putting control back into the hands of parents with more granular screen time features.

articles.title: Apple is tweaking its controversial Liquid Glass design - TechCrunch
articles.description: While some users liked the sleek, transparent designs that look "glassy," others found Apple's design overhaul from last year to be hard to read.

articles.title: Google AI Plus gets price drop to $4.99 and storage bump - 9to5Google
articles.description: Google announced today that its AI Plus subscription is getting a price drop to $4.99 per month and now includes 400 GB of storage.
